claimText: | Chenab Bridge | • Engineering Marvel: World's highest railway arch bridge (359m above river bed, 35m higher than Eiffel Tower).\n• Strategic Link: Critical component of the USBRL, enabling all-weather troop and logistics mobility to the Kashmir Valley. |
